Custom Standard Size Banners for Indoor & Outdoor Business Displays

Durable Vinyl & Mesh Standard Size Banner Material with Custom Printing Options

PASTE INTO: Product Title / Subtitle Section -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== CONFIGURATOR LABELS ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW Select your standard size banner material, finishing options, and upload your artwork for professional business displays. Available in vinyl, mesh, and fabric materials for indoor and outdoor installation. PASTE INTO: Configurator Labels -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCT OVERVIEW TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Standard Size Banner Material for Professional Indoor & Outdoor Displays

Standard size banners are printed on high-quality 13oz scrim vinyl banner material with woven fiber reinforcement for extra strength and durability. These versatile banners work perfectly for indoor and outdoor business displays, events, and promotional installations.

Your standard size banners are digitally-printed in full color using state-of-the-art, large-format printers for vibrant colors that stand out. Select from our banner templates to customize in the online designer with backgrounds, clip-art and text, or upload your own professional artwork.

Six Professional Banner Materials Available

13 oz Matte Vinyl Banners: Our most popular high-quality matte vinyl material features low shine and rich color reproduction for professional business displays.

13 oz Gloss Vinyl Banners: High-shine vinyl material produces vibrant, crisp colors and graphics for premium indoor installations.

18 oz Vinyl Banners: Extra heavy-duty matte vinyl with blockout coating provides maximum durability for outdoor weather conditions.

Mesh Banners: 8 oz PVC polyester mesh with 37% airflow reduces wind load, ideal for outdoor fence installations and windy locations.

Fabric Banners: Premium nylon/polyester blend Banner Soft material creates high-end indoor displays with professional appearance.

Adhesive Banners: Available in standard tack (3-5 year outdoor lifespan) and extreme tack vinyl for low-energy surface applications.

Size Variance Notice: Vinyl material may vary up to 1/2 inch per linear foot due to temperature-sensitive properties during printing and finishing. Contact customer service for precision requirements.

PASTE INTO: Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Banner Finishing Options for Standard Size Display Installation

Heat Welded Hems & Grommets

Professional finishing with reinforced hems and brass grommets spaced every 2 feet provides secure mounting points for outdoor installations and high-wind conditions.

Pole Pockets

Sewn pole pocket finishing allows banners to slide over mounting poles or rods for clean indoor displays and outdoor pole installations.

Reinforced Corners

Additional material reinforcement at banner corners prevents tearing during installation and extends banner lifespan in outdoor conditions.

Reinforced Hems

Double-folded and sewn hems provide extra strength along banner edges for durability during handling and installation.

Double-Sided Banner Finishing

Two banner faces sewn together create visibility from both directions, ideal for hanging installations and street-facing business displays.

PASTE INTO: Material Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FINISHING OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Artwork Requirements for Standard Size Banner Printing

Artwork Guidelines

Upload print-ready files in high resolution (300 DPI minimum) for optimal print quality. Accepted file formats include PDF, AI, EPS, JPG, PNG, and TIFF.

Artwork & Order Proofs

Digital proofs are provided for approval before production begins. Review colors, text placement, and overall design to ensure your banner meets expectations.

Color Match Proof System

Our color matching system ensures consistent brand colors across multiple banner orders. Pantone color matching available for brand-specific requirements.

Design Requirements

  • Include 0.125" bleed around all edges
  • Keep important text and graphics 0.25" from edges (safe area)
  • Use CMYK color mode for accurate color reproduction
  • Embed all fonts or convert text to outlines
PASTE INTO: Finishing Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCTION TIMES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Production Times for Custom Standard Size Banner Orders

Production Time Tables

1 Business Day Priority

Rush production for urgent banner needs. Standard finishing options available with next-business-day completion.

2 Business Days Express

Fast turnaround for time-sensitive projects with full finishing options and quality control review.

3 Business Days Standard

Our standard production timeline includes artwork review, printing, finishing, and quality inspection.

5 Business Days Saver

Budget-friendly production option with same quality standards and extended timeline for cost savings.

Production Note: Production times begin after artwork approval and payment processing. Holiday and weekend days are excluded from business day calculations.

PASTE INTO: Production Times Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PAYMENT OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Standard Size Banner Payment & Ordering Options

Payment Methods Accepted

  • Credit Cards (Visa, MasterCard, American Express, Discover)
  • PayPal and PayPal Credit
  • Business checks (with approved credit application)
  • Wire transfers for large orders
  • Net terms available for qualified business accounts

Order Processing

Orders are processed immediately upon payment confirmation. Credit card payments process instantly, while check payments require clearing before production begins.

Custom Quote Options

Special pricing available for bulk orders, unique sizes, and custom specifications. Contact our customer service team for personalized quotes on large projects.

PASTE INTO: Payment Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== SHIPPING GUIDELINES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Shipping Options for Standard Size Banner Delivery

General Shipping Guidelines

Standard size banners ship folded in protective packaging to prevent damage during transport. Large banners may ship rolled in tubes for crease-free delivery.

Shipping Methods Available

  • Ground Shipping: 3-7 business days, most economical option
  • 2-Day Express: Expedited delivery for time-sensitive installations
  • Next Day Air: Overnight delivery available for rush orders
  • Freight Shipping: Required for oversized orders over 150 lbs

Shipping Maps & Coverage

We ship throughout the contiguous United States with tracking provided for all orders. Alaska and Hawaii shipping available with extended delivery times and additional fees.

International Shipping: Available to select countries with customs documentation and international shipping rates.

PASTE INTO: Shipping Guidelines Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== COMMON USES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Professional Standard Size Banner Uses for Business & Events

Business & Retail Displays

  • Storefront promotions and sale announcements
  • Grand opening and special event advertising
  • Trade show booth backdrops and displays
  • Restaurant menu boards and specials

Event & Organization Banners

  • School and sports team spirit banners
  • Church events and community gatherings
  • Political campaigns and election signage
  • Festival and fair vendor displays

Construction & Industrial Uses

  • Construction site safety and information signs
  • Real estate development marketing
  • Equipment rental and service advertising
  • Warehouse and facility identification

Indoor Installation Applications

  • Conference room and meeting displays
  • Lobby and reception area branding
  • Retail point-of-sale promotions
  • Museum and gallery exhibitions
PASTE INTO: Common Uses Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ARTWORK TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Standard Size Banner Design & Upload Options

Upload a Print Ready File

Step 1: Choose your standard size banner product and dimensions

Step 2: Upload your design file from your computer in accepted formats (PDF, AI, EPS, JPG, PNG, TIFF)

Professional Design Services

Step 1: Select your standard size banner product and size requirements

Step 2: Upload reference images, logos, or inspiration materials

Step 3: Provide detailed design instructions including colors, text, layout preferences, and any special requirements for our design team

File Preparation Guidelines

  • Resolution: 300 DPI minimum for sharp print quality
  • Color Mode: CMYK for accurate color reproduction
  • Bleed: Include 0.125" bleed on all sides
  • Safe Area: Keep text and important graphics 0.25" from edges
  • Fonts: Embed fonts or convert text to outlines/curves
PASTE INTO: Artwork Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== POST-TAB CONTENT ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Order Custom Standard Size Banners for Your Business Display

Ready to create professional standard size banners for your business or event? Our easy online ordering system guides you through material selection, sizing, and artwork upload for fast, high-quality banner production.

Three Easy Ways to Order

Upload Print-Ready Artwork: Choose your banner specifications and upload your professional design files for immediate production.

Use Our Design Services: Our experienced design team creates custom banners based on your specifications, brand guidelines, and creative requirements.

Online Design Tool: Customize pre-made templates with your text, images, and brand colors using our user-friendly design interface.

Need Help? Call us at (320) 391-5300 and our customer service representatives will assist with material selection, sizing recommendations, and artwork requirements.

Custom Projects: Special sizes, unique materials, and bulk orders qualify for custom pricing. Request a custom quote for specialized projects and volume discounts.

PASTE INTO: Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Frequently Asked Questions

What are standard size banners?

Standard size banners are professionally printed vinyl, mesh, or fabric banners available in common dimensions for business displays, events, and promotional installations. They feature durable materials and professional finishing options.

What standard vinyl banner sizes do you offer?

We offer standard sizes from 2x4 feet up to 4x12 feet, with custom sizing available for specific installation requirements. Popular sizes include 3x6, 4x8, and 2x6 feet for most business applications.

What size banner should I choose for my viewing distance?

For viewing distances of 10-20 feet, choose 2x4 or 3x6 banners. For 20-50 feet, select 4x8 or larger. Consider text height of 1 inch per 10 feet of viewing distance for optimal readability.

What material are they made of?

Standard size banners are made from 13oz or 18oz vinyl, 8oz mesh, fabric, or adhesive vinyl materials. Each material offers different durability and installation characteristics for specific applications.

What's the best material for outdoor standard-size banners?

18oz vinyl provides maximum durability for harsh outdoor conditions, while mesh banners reduce wind load in high-wind areas. 13oz vinyl works well for moderate outdoor use and indoor displays.

Matte vs. gloss vinyl: which finish should I pick?

Matte finish reduces glare and works well for outdoor viewing and photography, while gloss finish creates vibrant colors ideal for indoor retail displays and close-up viewing.

What is the thickness of your banners?

Our banner materials range from 8oz (mesh) to 18oz (heavy-duty vinyl). 13oz vinyl is our standard weight, providing good durability while remaining cost-effective for most applications.

Do these banners come double-sided?

Double-sided banners are available with printing on both faces, ideal for hanging installations and street-facing displays where visibility from both directions is important.

What finishing should I choose: hems and grommets or pole pockets?

Hems and grommets work best for mounting with ropes, bungees, or zip ties to fences and structures. Pole pockets are ideal for sliding over poles or rods for clean installations.

How do I install my banner?

Installation depends on finishing type. Grommet banners use zip ties, bungees, or rope through mounting holes. Pole pocket banners slide over poles or rods. Consider wind load and mounting surface when planning installation.

Do you have recommended file types and resolution for printing?

We accept PDF, AI, EPS, JPG, PNG, and TIFF files at 300 DPI minimum resolution. CMYK color mode ensures accurate color reproduction for professional results.

Should I include bleed and a safe area in my design?

Yes, include 0.125" bleed around all edges and keep important text/graphics 0.25" from edges (safe area) to ensure proper trimming and prevent content loss during finishing.

PASTE INTO: FAQ Tab --------------------------------------------------
